{{Quote|Warning! The Grand Protector's Home Fleet strictly monitors and controls Tyrius system space. All vessels must identify themselves immediately upon arriving in system. Direct further inquiries to the Home Fleet or Starport Control.|Tyrius system [[Datafile/Legends|datafile]]|<ref name="guide">''[[Shadows of the Empire Planets Guide]]''</ref>}}
The '''Rodian Home Fleet''' was a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] starfleet.

==History==
The fleet was established during the [[Old Republic era]] by the [[Soammei clan]]'s [[Chief Protector]] who had made himself the "[[Grand Protector/Legends|Grand Protector]]" (translated from the [[Rodese/Legends|Rodese]] "Inta'si'rin'na"). The same Grand Protector had also founded the [[Goa-Ato/Legends|Grand Protector's Hunter's Guild]] (also known as the [[Goa-Ato/Legends|Goa-Ato]]) which restricted offworld passage to [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] only.


The Fleet was typically, as it was the case during the rule of the [[Chattza clan/Legends|Chattza clan]], controlled by the ruling clan's [[Protector (Rin'na)|Protectors]]. It consisted of a fleet of [[Rendili StarDrive/Legends|Rendil StarDrive]] light [[corvette/Legends|corvettes]] modified into [[Imperial Customs Corvette|Rodian Customs Corvettes]], supplanted by [[Imperial Office of Customs/Legends|Imperial Customs]].<ref name="guide" />

The Rodian Home Fleet's primary mission was to enforce the jurisdiction of the Goa-Ato and prevent illegal emigrants from leaving [[Rodia/Legends|Rodia]]. It was also in charge of defending the [[Tyrius system/Legends|Tyrius system]], which contained Rodia. 

Customs ships, always defended by other ships, identified newcomer ships to the system, IDs and permits, especially of Rodians who returned, and searched for contraband. The fleet also obliged incoming ships to land to the designated [[spaceport/Legends|spaceports]], usually the [[Equator City/Legends|Equator City]], and pursued ships that headed elsewhere.<ref name="provincial">{{WEGCite|story=Provincial Problems|book=Shadows of the Empire Planets Guide}}</ref>

However, the Home Fleet had not always been successful over the years, and many illegal Rodian emigrants succeeded in going off-world, while [[smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] secretly landed in other provinces;<ref name="brief">{{WEGCite|story=A Brief Visit to Rodia|book=Shadows of the Empire Planets Guide}}</ref><ref name="provincial" /> those smugglers captured by the Home Fleet were used in the gladiatorial hunts.<ref name="guide" />
